name: Kim Pine, Ramona Flowers, Julie Powers
description:
Yo...

Hello guys, I rested and decided to make a bot but... just so you won't get bored.

Thank you so much to everyone who supported me during this time in my life... I saw that many of you also lost a loved one... My condolences to you and I am also glad to know that I am not the only one who experienced such terrible feelings. My emptiness has not changed after the loss of my father, but I understand that he would not want me to cry, I need to move on no matter what. Thank you so much again for your support. I read every comment with tears in my eyes, tears of joy from seeing how many people support me. I will try my best for everyone. For every single one.

Artist: yogurt7

(Btw I don't even know who in the middle, I saw tags Julie, Kim and Ramona so It's not my problem)

(All characters are 20+ years old and it's officially)
creator: TerosX
